experiment: T1 iter56 Bayesian per-item no-aux — goal-v1 slot T1-C

formula.experiment: T1 iter56 Bayesian per-item hierarchical regression, NO aux {15,18} — goal-v1 slot T1-C
formula.rationale: Codex hard constraint: aux items {15,18} are EXCLUDED to ensure the slot is NOT a probabilistic re-derivation of iter34's auxiliary chain mechanism. The orthogonal mechanism is partial pooling across items via shared subject-level H&Y prior.
formula.stage1: Ridge alpha=1.0 on H&Y + cv_yrs + cv_sex + cv_dbs
formula.per_item_features: K=500 LGB-importance against item-i residual, then PCA reduce to K_PCA=16 components (fold-local)
bayesian_model: y_si = alpha_s + intercept_i + X_si @ beta_i + epsilon
formula.inference: numpyro SVI with AutoNormal guide, Adam lr=0.01, 1000 iters. MAP point estimate from posterior.
formula.test_subject_prediction: alpha_test = gamma * HY_test (no random effect; equivalent to alpha_raw=0). Per-item pred = alpha_test + intercept_i + X_te_i @ beta_i.
formula.t1_combine: T1 = Stage_1_pred + sum_i (item_test_pred + item_train_mean) - sum_i item_train_mean
formula.primary_stat: per-subject sign-flip permutation (10000) + BCa CI + +0.025 MCID
